Class OrderController

java.lang.Object
Controllers.BaseDisplayController
Controllers.OrderController
public class OrderController extends BaseDisplayController
Controller for displaying the order history of a user. Extends BaseDisplayController to show confirmed reservations in a table. Provides functionality to refresh reservations and navigate back to the subscriber UI.

  • Field Summary

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Initializes the controller. Sets up table columns and registers this controller as the active display controller. Refreshes the reservations list on initialization.

    • showReservations

      public void showReservations(List<Reservation> list)
      Displays a list of confirmed reservations in the table.
      Specified by:
      showReservations in class BaseDisplayController
      Parameters:
      list - the list of Reservation objects to display

    • refreshReservations

      public void refreshReservations()
      Refreshes the reservations table by requesting the current user's reservations from the client handler.

    • onPreviousPage

      private void onPreviousPage()
      Navigates back to the subscriber UI.
